title: Shove!
description:
Have you ever thought:
- What If I could launch TNT at other people with my bare hands?
- What If I could deflect arrows and projectiles mid air?
- What If I could play baseball with anvils?
Boy, do I have a mod for you!
body:
# Shove!
Shove is a simple combat mod that adds a new action to the game: The Shove.
This feature allows you to deflect projectiles, punt mobs, and launch objects
## How To Use
1. Go into the key bindings menu and bind the shove key (personally, I like binding it to L-Click)
2. Crouch next to an entity (you should see a hand icon appear under your crosshair)
3. Press your bound key and watch it fly
## Features
- Shove Feature
- A baseball bat that increases shove distance and speed
- Bombs to shove around
- Game rule for shove strength
## Credits
Made by NullCode using Mcreator

Feathers API by ElenaiDev
